name: Baked Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease an 8x8 inch baking dish.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as needed.
5. Stir in grated cheese, salt, and cooked rice. Set aside.
6. Using a sharp knife, carefully cut a 1/4 inch slice from the top of each tomato, making sure not to cut through the bottom.
7. Scoop out the center pulp from each tomato using a spoon.
8. Discard the tomato pulp or reserve the liquid if desired.
9. Sprinkle salt over the hollowed-out tomatoes.
10. Fill each tomato with the cheese and rice mixture.
11. Place the stuffed tomatoes in the prepared baking dish.
12. Pour any remaining tomato juice into the dish, covering the tomatoes partially.
13. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the tomatoes are tender and heated through.
14. Remove from oven and garnish with parsley before serving.
